title: Beni Mellal、Béni Mellal-Khénifra — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Beni Mellal、Béni Mellal-Khénifraの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

Beni MellalはBéni Mellal-Khénifraにある人口192,000の都市です。A city at the foot of the Atlas Mountains, known for its olive groves, waterfalls, and agricultural production.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
